title: SPARTA Crypto-D1 Data QA Runtime Tool v1
research_objective: Document the executable runtime QA tool that validates an OPERATOR-SUPPLIED frozen Crypto-D1 dataset directory against the Bundle 14 Data QA / Freeze Spec BEFORE any backtest plan may reference the dataset. This doc describes the tool's contract, inputs, check groups, status model, and safety boundaries. The tool does NOT fetch data, does NOT connect to any exchange, does NOT run a backtest, and does NOT authorize trading. QA_PASS is a precondition for a future, separately-authorized backtest plan -- never the authorization itself.

expected_inputs_at_dataset_dir.manifest.json: Per-dataset manifest that passes crypto_d1_dataset_manifest_check.py and pins protocol + data_contract versions; research_lane=crypto_d1_protocol, market_type=spot, timeframe=1d.
expected_inputs_at_dataset_dir.CHECKSUMS.txt: One '<sha256_hex>  <filename>' line per dataset file; verified at runtime against the bytes on disk.
expected_inputs_at_dataset_dir.FREEZE_RECORD.txt: Key:value lines including freeze_timestamp_utc and at least three version pins.
expected_inputs_at_dataset_dir.fees.json: Per-venue taker fee + slippage assumption (+ optional spread_proxy); no QA_PASS without taker fee and slippage declared.
expected_inputs_at_dataset_dir.<asset>_daily.csv: One or more daily-OHLCV CSV files carrying the 9 required columns.

qa_check_groups.A_manifest_integrity: manifest.json present + parses; all 35 Bundle-13 required fields populated; protocol + data_contract version pins; research_lane / market_type / timeframe; freeze_status DRAFT|FROZEN; QA_status valid; allowed_use + forbidden_use present.
qa_check_groups.B_timestamp: No duplicate (symbol, timestamp); 24/7 calendar (weekday-only rejected); missing-day reconciliation against manifest.missing_day_policy; UTC daily storage.
qa_check_groups.C_OHLCV: high < low rejected; self-consistency high>=max(o,c,l) and low<=min(o,c,h); positive OHLC; close not missing (parser-enforced).
qa_check_groups.D_volume: Negative volume FAIL; zero-volume bar WARN (24/7 asset, review required).
qa_check_groups.E_symbol_source: BTC/ETH/SOL canonical; quote_currency consistency per symbol; source consistency (WARN on mismatch); duplicate (symbol, source, timestamp) rejected; row-level source_id parser-enforced.
qa_check_groups.F_fee_slippage: fees.json present; taker declared; slippage declared (no PASS if either missing); spread_proxy WARN when absent.
qa_check_groups.G_freeze: freeze_status FROZEN; CHECKSUMS.txt present + every listed file sha256-verified; FREEZE_RECORD.txt present with freeze_timestamp_utc + version pins; manifest.row_count_actual recorded.

qa_status_model.QA_DRAFT: No checks could run (e.g., --dataset-dir does not exist). Not eligible for any downstream use.
qa_status_model.QA_PASS: All 7 groups passed with zero warnings; deterministic mechanical outcome. Does NOT imply profitability and does NOT authorize a backtest by itself.
qa_status_model.QA_WARN: No blocking failures but >=1 non-blocking warning; operator must attach a written acceptance note before any backtest plan references the dataset; lane stays WATCH.
qa_status_model.QA_FAIL: >=1 blocking failure; dataset MUST NOT be referenced; remediation requires a NEW dataset_version.
qa_status_model.QA_BLOCKED: External block declared in manifest (QA_status=QA_BLOCKED); dataset MUST NOT be referenced until cleared.
qa_status_model.QA_RETIRED: Superseded by a newer version; read-only for reproducibility / audit.

classifier_rule: QA_BLOCKED if the manifest declares an external block; else QA_FAIL if any check FAILs; else QA_WARN if any check WARNs; else QA_PASS.

emitted_report.qa_report.json: Populates all 26 fields declared by Bundle 14 QA_report_schema.required_fields; safety_flags block pinned; written to --out-dir only.
emitted_report.qa_report.md: Human-readable rendering with verdict, safety flags, blocking failures, warnings, row counts, forbidden next steps.
emitted_report.write_target: --out-dir supplied by the operator; NEVER inside --dataset-dir; never under data/crypto_d1_research/.

cli.validate-spec: python tools/crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py validate-spec  (validates the Bundle 14 QA spec as a precondition; exit 0 on OK)
cli.show-spec: python tools/crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py show-spec  (prints a structured spec summary)
cli.run: python tools/crypto_d1_data_qa_runtime_tool.py run --dataset-dir <PATH> --out-dir <PATH>  (exit 0 for QA_PASS/QA_WARN, else 2)

candidate_registry_status_after_doc.note: This doc pair is added to the crypto_d1 lane extra_files for traceability only. The lane stays WATCH; evidence does NOT become STRONG; the candidate is NOT marked ACTIVE. No broker / live / paper / backtest authorization is implied.

safety_boundaries: No broker control, no exchange connection, no API keys, no .env, no credential handling.
No live trading. No paper-order execution. No order placement.
No scheduler / background daemon. No external network calls in this tool's runtime.
No data fetch. Reads only the operator-supplied --dataset-dir; writes only --out-dir.
Never creates data/crypto_d1_research/. Never writes inside --dataset-dir.
On missing data, emits QA_DRAFT or QA_FAIL; never fabricates results.
QA_PASS does not imply profitability. QA_PASS does not authorize a backtest by itself. A QA report cannot authorize paper or live trading.
no_profit_claim_policy: Clean daily OHLCV data does not imply profit.
A QA report cannot authorize backtesting by itself.
A QA report cannot authorize paper or live trading.
No data fetch is authorized by this tool.
Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested with full costs.
A good historical chart does not imply future returns.
